name: SpiderShield Runtime Guard
description: Automatic security checks for every tool call — Trust Score verification, DLP scanning, and audit logging powered by SpiderRating's database of 15,923 rated MCP servers.

policy.description: Policy mode: balanced (default), strict, or audit-only

apiKey.description: Optional SpiderRating Pro API key for cloud audit logging

blockThreshold.description: Trust score below this = block (default: 3.0 for Grade F)

warnThreshold.description: Trust score below this = warn (default: 5.0 for Grade D)

policy.label: Policy Mode
policy.help: balanced: block dangerous + warn risky. strict: block unknown too. audit-only: log everything, block nothing.

apiKey.label: Pro API Key (optional)
apiKey.help: Enables cloud audit dashboard at spiderrating.com/dashboard
